description_long: This guard rail consists of three horizontal rails evenly spaced and supported by two vertical posts at each end. The structure is made of a uniform, metallic material with a muted gray-green finish, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The rails and posts have a rectangular cross-section, and the overall build is robust, designed to withstand significant impact. There are no visible fasteners, decorative elements, or reflective markings, emphasizing its functional purpose. The ends of the rails are blunt and squared off, with no flaring or additional safety treatments. The surface appears smooth and hard, suitable for use along roadsides, parking lots, or urban walkways to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from crossing into restricted areas.
description: A sturdy, gray-green metal guard rail with three horizontal rails and two vertical posts, featuring a smooth, industrial finish and blunt ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced horizontal rails supported by two vertical posts, all with a rectangular profile.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin depth of the rails and posts, emphasizing the flat, planar construction.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same three horizontal rails and two vertical posts visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the narrow profile and flatness of the structure.
